summary: Backend 13/13 pytest tests pass (after fix). Frontend Expo web preview loads, login works with seeded test@test.com/test123, Home/Library/Discover/Profile tabs render Georgian UI correctly with proper testIDs. Profile shows user data + stats grid + logout. Could not verify the Player screen (breath countdown, play/pause, save) because tapping on a session card via text did not trigger navigation in browser automation; tabs in Expo Router web keep sibling routes in DOM, complicating per-screen text dumps.

integration_issues.issue: Could not confirm navigation to /player via Playwright using text or a session-card-* testID. There is no `[data-testid^="session-card-"]` selector — feat cards use `feat-<id>` instead. Need to verify the onPress on home `breathing-card` / `beginner-course` and on `feat-*`, `rec-*`, `quick-*` cards in Discover actually pushes to the player route.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: `[expo-av] deprecated, use expo-audio/expo-video` (SDK 54). Not blocking but should be migrated.
Console warns: `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents`.

action_items: Verify session card onPress -> router.push('/player?id=...') actually fires for feat-*, rec-*, quick-*, breathing-card, beginner-course, evening-course. In current automation, clicking the visible session text/card on Home/Discover did not change the active route.

Standardise testIDs to match the spec / review request: code uses `login-submit-btn`, `logout-btn` while the request mentions `login-submit-button`, `logout-button`. Either rename in code or update the request — pick one convention.
Add a dedicated `session-card-<id>` testID on tappable session items so testing agents can locate them deterministically.
Migrate expo-av to expo-audio for SDK 54 readiness (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentials with wildcard. Fine here because mobile uses Bearer header, but if cookies are ever added, restrict origins.
Backend stores history/saved_sessions inside the user document — fine for MVP but will not scale; consider separate collections later.
JWT_SECRET is read from env without a fallback (good — fail-fast). Ensure it's set in /app/backend/.env.

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (login, all 5 tabs, profile stats verified; player flow & save toggle UI not verified)

seed_data_creation: Backend test_complete_session test added 1 history entry (5 min, stress-relief) for test@test.com — visible in Profile stats (1 day / 5 min / 1 session / 1 course).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://mindful-breathe-11.preview.emergentagent.com. Login testIDs: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn (NOT -button). Tab labels (Georgian): მედიტაცია/ბიბლიოთეკა/ძილი/აღმოაჩინე/პროფილი — clickable. Profile: profile-name, profile-email, stat-days, stat-minutes, stat-sessions, stat-courses, logout-btn. Discover cards: quick-*, rec-*, feat-*. Home: home-greeting, special-offer-banner, breathing-card, beginner-course, evening-course. Player route is /player?id=... — verify onPress wiring. Backend pytest entry: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
rca_of_issue: Player flow could not be confirmed: clicking session text via Playwright did not produce a player URL change, but Expo Router web renders sibling tab routes in the same DOM, so inner_text dumps are not a reliable per-screen check. Recommend main agent (a) add session-card testIDs and (b) self-verify navigation by tapping breathing-card / feat-morning-meditation and asserting URL contains 'player'.
